What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothache can be caused by several factors, including tooth decay, gum disease, a cracked tooth, an exposed tooth root, a tooth fracture, an infected dental pulp (leading to an abscess), sinusitis, or even stress-induced teeth grinding (bruxism).
